title: AnalyzerNodeMapping
description: Schema for node type mappings. Defines how analyzer output node types are mapped to DR model node types across the 12 layers.

version.description: Optional version identifier for this mapping configuration

field_conventions.description: Optional documentation of field naming conventions and semantics used in this mapping

mappings.description: Array of node type mapping definitions

cbm_label.description: Node type label from CBM analyzer output (PascalCase, e.g., 'Route', 'Function')

dr_layer.description: Canonical DR layer name. Must be one of the 12 layers with correct naming (e.g., 'data-model' not 'data_model').

dr_element_type.description: Element type within the DR layer (e.g., 'component', 'endpoint', 'table')

confidence.description: Mapping confidence level indicating reliability of this mapping

description.description: Optional explanation of why this mapping exists or any special conditions

source_reference.description: Optional provenance configuration for extracting source code location and symbol information

provenance.description: How the provenance was determined (extracted directly from code or inferred from patterns)

from.description: Field or property in analyzer output that contains file location
Field or property in analyzer output that contains symbol name or identifier

dr_element_fields.description: Optional configuration for shaping DR element fields from analyzer output. Supports both flat object format (keyed by attribute name) and legacy attributes array.

attributes.description: Legacy format: Field mappings for element attributes

default.description: Default value if source field is missing

additionalProperties.description: Flat format: Field mapping keyed by attribute name

name_template.description: Template for generating field name or value

id_source.description: Field from analyzer output to use as ID source

template.description: Template string for deriving the field value

attribute_mappings.description: Optional field-to-attribute mappings from analyzer to DR model

transform.description: Optional transformation function or rule to apply to the field value

dr_element_type_promoted.description: Target element type for promotion when heuristics are met (e.g., 'applicationservice')

promotion_heuristics.description: Named heuristics that qualify this element for promotion to a higher-level type

verify_role.description: Role designation for verification scope (e.g., 'primary' for Route elements)

evidence_fields.description: Named-field object with evidence fields from analyzer output used to support mapping confidence

conditions.description: Optional conditions that must be met for this mapping to apply

unmapped_labels.description: Node type labels from CBM analyzer that could not be mapped to DR model elements

description.description: Overall description of unmapped labels and rationale

labels.description: Array of PascalCase CBM node type labels that are not mapped
